name: chain_openclaw__arcads__550_videos_per_day
method:
OpenClaw + Arcads = 550 videos per day

Fully-realistic UGC ads — cinematic lighting, human motion, perfect pacing — powered by AI agents.

UGC cost: $5
Production time: minutes
Scale: instant

One AI

stages.task: scan TikTok/IG trending hooks and UGC formats
generate 10-20 ad script variants per product angle using claude -p
render UGC videos via Remotion templates + free TTS
score videos on hook strength, pacing, CTA clarity — reject below 6
push approved videos to posting queue with platform-specific formatting
